tasks.label: init-git-caja-susinos
tasks.command: git init && git checkout -b main && git remote add origin https://github.com/Hectorgs1988/Caja-Susinos.git && git add . && git commit -m "feat: MVP caja barra con React + Vite"

tasks.label: push-github-caja-susinos
tasks.command: git remote -v && git push -u origin main

tasks.label: cleanup-node-modules-git
tasks.command:
printf "node_modules/
dist/
.DS_Store
" > .gitignore && git rm -r --cached node_modules && git add .gitignore && git commit -m "chore: ignore node_modules and dist" && git push

tasks.label: verify-git-sync
tasks.command: git status -sb && git log --oneline -2 && git remote -v

tasks.label: create-develop-branch
tasks.command: git checkout -b develop && git push -u origin develop && git branch --show-current && git branch -a

tasks.label: verify-develop-tracking
tasks.command: git status -sb && git for-each-ref --format='%(refname:short) -> %(upstream:short)' refs/heads/develop refs/heads/main

tasks.label: publish-develop-baseline
tasks.command: git checkout develop && git add -A && if git diff --cached --quiet; then echo "NO_CHANGES_TO_COMMIT"; else git commit -m "chore: baseline develop v1.0.0-alpha.0"; fi && git push origin develop && if git rev-parse -q --verify "refs/tags/V1.0.0-alpha.0" >/dev/null; then echo "TAG_ALREADY_EXISTS"; else git tag -a V1.0.0-alpha.0 -m "V1.0.0-alpha.0"; fi && git push origin V1.0.0-alpha.0 && git status -sb && git show --no-patch --oneline V1.0.0-alpha.0
